commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Control UI paste handling that converts text/plain `data:image/...;base64,...` clipboard payloads into chat image attachments, plus a regression test and changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main returns from `handlePaste` when the clipboard has no image file item, so a text/plain data image URL can fall through into the textarea. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; this protected maintainer-labeled PR has no blocking findings and should proceed through human review, CI, or landing.

target.title: fix(ui): attach pasted data image text
target.body:
Summary:
- Convert pasted text/plain image data URLs into normal Control UI chat attachments.
- Keep ordinary text paste behavior unchanged, and normalize MIME/base64 before storing the attachment payload.
- Add a jsdom regression for whitespace-wrapped data image clipboard text.

Fixes #62604. Thanks @cpwilhelmi.

Behavior addressed: Control UI composer could insert a huge `data:image/...;base64,...` clipboard payload as textarea text when the clipboard exposed an image as text/plain instead of a file item.
Real environment tested: local Node 24.13.0 with jsdom/lit rendering of the chat composer.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `/Users/steipete/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.13.0/installation/bin/node --import tsx --input-type=module <direct jsdom paste assertion>`; `PATH=/Users/steipete/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.13.0/installation/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: the direct assertion rendered `renderChat`, dispatched a paste event with whitespace-wrapped `data:image/PNG;base64,...` text, observed default prevention, and verified one `image/png` attachment with normalized stored data URL.
Observed result after fix: pasted data image text is converted into an attachment instead of entering the composer; autoreview clean with no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: full browser/CI UI lane locally; focused Vitest prebundle stalled before test execution on this checkout, so CI owns the normal suite.
target.author: steipete
